trans-unit.source: AI Foundation — providers, stats, and setup.
Overview for AI Foundation: configured providers, usage stats, MCP status, and quick setup.
Guided setup wizard for TYPO3 backend usergroup AI permissions.
Only TYPO3 administrators can configure AI permissions.
Build AI-powered TYPO3 extensions on top of AI Foundation — a shared gateway built on symfony/ai-platform.
Dashboard for your AI Foundation — requests, usage, and system health.
Configured AI provider connections. Add your own API keys per provider.
Define brand context profiles to give AI generations a consistent personality and voice.
No brand context profiles yet. Add a profile to give AI features a consistent brand voice.
The active profile is automatically injected into all AI generation prompts.
Define your brand identity, voice, target audience, and content rules.
Enter a website URL and click Research to auto-fill brand details using your site default AI provider.
Auto-research will be available in a future update.
What does your brand do? Who do you serve?
Describe how your brand should sound in AI-generated content.
The primary persona (first row) needs both a name and level for the {target_persona} placeholder.
Define always/never rules injected as {content_rules} in prompts.
Words and phrases the AI must never use (max 20).
Type a word and press Enter
Preferred terms and phrases to reinforce your brand voice (max 15).
Type a keyword and press Enter
Type a competitor and press Enter
Used for the {language} placeholder in AI prompts.
Paste an example paragraph that represents your ideal brand voice.
Industry regulations, disclaimers, or legal constraints for AI content.
Upload brand guidelines (PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT, CSV, JSON — max 3 × 10 MB).
Select brand documents to extract text for AI context.
PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT, CSV, JSON — up to 3 files, 10 MB each.
Document upload will be available in a future update.
Manage server status, connection modes, and client access tokens.
AI tools exposed via Model Context Protocol — power your AI extensions and enable custom developer integrations.
Configure external MCP servers and monitor connector health.
Control extension-level AI capabilities, defaults, and access.
Click any card to configure its AI settings
No AI features match your search.
Try a different keyword or clear the filters.
Update defaults, prompts, automation, and access control settings.
AI Assistant extension configuration was updated.
AI Accessibility extension configuration was updated.
AI Foundation extension configuration was updated.
AI Chatbot/Search extension configuration was updated.
AI Accessibility is not installed or not loaded.
AI Chatbot/Search is not installed or not loaded.
API key configured (%s). Leave blank to keep the existing key, or enter a new value to replace it.
Leave blank to keep existing key
Stored key configured. Enter a new key only to replace it.
AI Assistant is not installed or not loaded.
This extension is not installed or not loaded.
No settings were found for this feature.
Inspect request logs, usage analytics, and export usage data.
System log entries across all AI extensions — sync, training, errors and scheduler events.
No detailed error message was recorded for this entry.
Do you want to soft-delete this log entry?
Do you want to soft-delete %1$s selected log entries?
Select at least one entry to delete.
No request log entries for current filters.
The selected entry could not be deleted.
Manage reusable prompt templates for all AI modules.
The selected AI Context profile is applied automatically — its brand details are inserted into the prompt at runtime.
Profile used for %s — brand details are applied automatically at runtime.
Include each variable in your prompt text using square brackets, e.g. [Content].
Reference only — your custom prompt replaces this at runtime when selected.
The built-in default prompt is shown as placeholder text below when you select a prompt type. Enter your custom prompt to override it at runtime.
No prompts found for this category.
No prompt categories match your filters.
All default prompts are already synchronized.
Action failed. Please verify prompt data.
Prompt validation failed. Select a valid scope and type, and include all required variables in the prompt text.
Please select a scope and prompt type.
The selected prompt type is not valid. Choose a type from the list.
The prompt type does not belong to the selected scope. Adjust scope or type.
Include all required variables in the prompt text: %s
Run AI commands manually or automate them with TYPO3 scheduler tasks.
Get help for a specific command:
Run a command with verbose output:
Read-only overview of AI Universe scheduler jobs (t3af:* and legacy nst3ai:/nst3aa:/nst3cs:/nst3af:* aliases). Manage, edit, and execute tasks in the TYPO3 Scheduler module.
Discover t3af:* CLI commands grouped by extension. Run manually or schedule them in the TYPO3 Scheduler.
No AI Universe CLI commands found.
Action failed. Please review the command/task configuration.
Tab shell is ready. Integrate feature-specific UI and data sources here.
Manage how your TYPO3 AI extensions connect to language models — use T3Planet's managed credits or bring your own API keys.
How AI requests are fulfilled across all TYPO3 AI extensions
No fallback chain — requests will error if the default provider fails.
All AI extensions will use this provider
Configure a new language model provider connection.
Copy provider configurations from another site into this site.
Choose a page in the page tree on the left. AI Providers and AI Features are stored per site at that site's root page.
The selected page is not part of a configured site. Choose a page that belongs to one of your sites.
No providers configured yet. Add your first provider.
Do you really want to delete the provider "%s"?
Required for Custom / Other: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (often ends with /v1).
Ollama base URL (no API key). In Docker/DDEV use http://host.docker.internal:11434 instead of localhost.
Leave blank to keep existing key
Leave blank to use the chat model for embeddings.
Costs are estimated using manual provider pricing fields.
Disabled providers are excluded from runtime usage.
When off, runtime works but dashboard excludes this provider rows.
Restrict to selected backend groups. Empty = available to all groups.
Controls how much request telemetry is stored. The strictest of provider and user setting wins.
When enabled, smart routing may not redirect requests away from this provider.
Configure providers below with the API keys you already pay for. Encrypted at rest.
T3Planet's hosted AI infrastructure — start in seconds, predictable billing, all features included.
Support reference token (quote this when contacting T3Planet):
Purchase a bundle below to add credits to your pool.
One-time purchases — credits never expire and stack with your balance
No subscription · buy when you need
No credit bundles available from T3Planet right now.
Know exactly what each AI action costs
Feature pricing is not available yet.
Charges on this installation (local mirror). Purchases appear after server sync.
No AI usage recorded on this installation yet.
T3Planet Credits mode is selected. Click Activate above to load your balance, bundles, and pricing from the T3Planet API.
Activate T3Planet Credits to see your balance and burn charts.
No requests logged in this period yet.
No AI requests were logged between %s. Try Last 30 days or a custom range that includes earlier activity.
Showing data for: %s. Trends compare to the prior equivalent period.
At current burn, credits may run out around %1$s (%2$s cr/day avg).
No provider spend recorded in this period.
No default Brand Context profile is configured for this site. AI generations will not include brand voice until you set one up.
Default profile “%1$s” is only %2$s%% complete. Finish identity, voice, and rules for consistent brand output.
Default profile “%1$s” is %2$s%% complete and ready for injection.
Override the site default profile for this AI feature. Leave on site default to use the profile marked as default in AI Context.
Your account has access to the following AI Foundation areas. Open a section below to get started.
No AI Foundation sections are assigned to your backend user group yet. Contact an administrator.
